history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! I see we have Our World Famous Fries® available in different sizes today. Could you let me know what type of food you'd like to order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you for the fries information. Could you recommend a vegan main item and a large drink to help keep me full? I'm vegan so I can't have dairy or meat.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry, but we don't have any vegan main items available right now. Could you let me know what type of food you'd like to order? We can check for other options.

history.speaker: client
history.text: I understand we don't have vegan mains right now. Could you check if there's anything else we have that could work for a vegan meal? I'm quite hungry so I'd like to order generously.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry, but we don't have any vegan meal options available right now. Would you like to try our fries or drinks instead? Could you let me know what type of food you'd like to order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you. I'm vegan so no dairy or meat. Could you check for vegan large fries and a large drink? I'm quite hungry and want to order generously.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We have vegan-friendly Our World Famous Fries® available. Would you like to proceed with those, and we can check for drink options?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, please proceed with the large vegan-friendly Our World Famous Fries. Could you also check for a large vegan drink?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! Your large vegan-friendly Our World Famous Fries are confirmed. We don't have any vegan drink options available at the moment. Would you like to proceed with just the fries, or would you prefer to choose a different option?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you for confirming the large vegan fries. Since I'm vegan and need a dairy-free drink but none are available right now, I'll take just the fries for now and check back later for a drink option.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: 1 large vegan-friendly Our World Famous Fries. We'll check for drink options when you return. Have a great day!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you for confirming the large vegan fries. Since no vegan drinks are available now, I'll take these for now and check back later. Have a great day!
